name: Google Workspace Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active google_workspace accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.primary_email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
